common.error: System error, please try again later.

conversation.error_fetching_inventory: Failed to fetch inventory stock from the system.
conversation.guest_denied: I'm sorry, you need to log in to perform this action. Please log in so I can assist you better!

nats.not_connected: Internal service is not ready, please try again later.
nats.request_timeout: Request to the system timed out. Please try again.

product.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch product data from the system.

inventory.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch inventory data from the system.

recommendation.no_history_fallback: We appreciate your interest. Since we don't have your purchase history yet, we've provided some starting suggestions to help you explore the fragrance style that suits you best.
